headline: Devon Energy Reshapes Profile With Coterra Merger And Gas Contracts
summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) has agreed to an all stock merger with Coterra Energy, targeting substantial annual pre tax synergies. The combined business plans for a material increase in dividends once the transaction closes. Devon has also entered into multi year gas marketing agreements tied to its natural gas production. These moves come as the company positions around expectations of a structural natural gas shortage linked to AI data center power needs and growing LNG capacity. Devon Energy...

headline: Texas Capital Lowers Coterra Energy (CTRA) Target to $31 after Devon Transaction
summary: Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE:CTRA) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 9, Texas Capital downgraded Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE:CTRA) to Hold from Buy. It also reduced its price target on the stock to $31 from $34. The firm cited its agreement to merge with Devon Energy (DVN) in […]
